title: salix × chrysocoma
intro: Salix × chrysocoma, also known as Willowherb, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Salicaceae family, resulting from the cross between the Salix alba and Salix fragilis species. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Salix × chrysocoma include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antimicrobial agent, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal medicine. Salix × chrysocoma can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be extracted and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
